Package microui.feedback

Class TooltipManager

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.feedback.TooltipManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public final class TooltipManager extends View
Manages the display of tooltips. This is a singleton class responsible for rendering a tooltip near the mouse cursor. On Android, tooltips are disabled.
